findings.evidence: `code/TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/UniversalCover/Deck/SubgroupFiberOrbit.lean:55` defines `SubgroupFiberOrbitQuotient H b := MulAction.orbitRel.Quotient H (p ⁻¹' {b})`; `mathlib/Mathlib/GroupTheory/GroupAction/Quotient.lean:357` provides `noncomputable def equivSubgroupOrbitsQuotientGroup ... : orbitRel.Quotient H X ≃ G ⧸ H`; the new body at `code/TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/UniversalCover/Deck/SubgroupFiberOrbitQuotientGroup.lean:70` is exactly `MulAction.equivSubgroupOrbitsQuotientGroup e H`.
findings.fix: Remove the deck-specific equivalence and use `MulAction.equivSubgroupOrbitsQuotientGroup e H` at call sites after installing `hreg.fiber_isPretransitive b` and `fiber_isCancelSMul (b := b) hp`; keep only genuinely needed wrapper simp lemmas if they cannot be stated against the Mathlib equivalence.
findings.issue: `regularSubgroupFiberOrbitQuotientEquivQuotientGroup` directly duplicates `MulAction.equivSubgroupOrbitsQuotientGroup` for `G := Deck p` and `X := p ⁻¹' {b}`.

summary: The new main deck equivalence is a direct specialization of an existing Mathlib equivalence, with only instance setup and the existing fibre-quotient abbreviation around it.
